query:
-- Check recent appointments with client phone numbers
SELECT 
  a.id, a.businessOwnerId, a.clientLocalId, a.date, a.status, a.serviceLocalId,
  c.phone as clientPhone, c.name as clientName,
  bo.businessName
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.localId = a.clientLocalId AND c.businessOwnerId = a.businessOwnerId
LEFT JOIN business_owners bo ON bo.id = a.businessOwnerId
ORDER BY a.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:

FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.localId = a.clientLocalId AND c.businessOwnerId = a.businessOwnerId
LEFT JOIN business_owners bo ON bo.id = a.businessOwnerId
ORDER BY a.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
